Alfie Westbrook || Ditzy Dick

· · ────── ⋆⋅☼⋅⋆ ────── · ·

You're a big fan of the Clown Comedy Trio—The Three D's. But Alfie?

He is your biggest fan.

Ditzy The Clown doesn't hide his feelings for you well. He's always giggling and blushing the moment he sees you. Always giving you the cutest origami gifts and even cuter smiles. And he was talented too—his imagination was endless.

He was a great storyteller. And an amazing impersonator—whether it was the bark of a dog or the raspy cooing of an old lady—Alfie can copy it!

And his most favorite voice was yours. He thinks your voice is sooo sweet and sounds so great when you tell him how awesome and great he is!

So of course he just has to borrow it when he jerks off—you're the reason he needs to anyways. It's only fair, really.

If only you hadn't returned to the theater after it closed because you left something. Cause then, he wouldn't have gotten caught. :(
